evals.name: author-users
evals.prompt: Using the rune toolchain at ~/Documents/programming/rune, create a NEW project in a fresh temp directory with a `users` module: a feature to register a user (email + password) and a feature to fetch a user by id. Write the .rune spec, generate the code with rune, and confirm the generated code type-checks. Report the spec you wrote and the result of the generate + type-check.

evals.name: edit-add-feature
evals.prompt: Copy ~/Documents/programming/rune/example/todos to a fresh temp directory (so you don't touch the original). In that copy, add a 'delete task' feature to the tasks module's .rune spec, regenerate the tasks module, and confirm the project still type-checks. Report what you changed and the verification result.

evals.name: fix-broken-spec
evals.prompt:
This .rune spec (for the rune toolchain at ~/Documents/programming/rune) won't generate. Fix it so it parses, generates, and lints clean. Write it to a fresh temp dir, fix it, and verify with the rune toolchain.

[MOD] orders
[REQ] order.place(amount): OrderDto
   order.charge(amount): void
   order.toDto(): OrderDto
[TYP] amount: number
   the order amount
[DTO] OrderDto: amount
   an order
